headline: Man's 'I'm Just A Night Owl' Is Code For 'I Stay Up Late Watching TikToks And Regret It Every Morning'
summary: The cycle: 3 AM scrolling, 7 AM alarm, 11 AM 'I need coffee.' 'It's my circadian rhythm,' Jake said. 'It's your choices,' his doctor said.
fullBody: Jake NightOwl claims he's 'genetically nocturnal.' His screen time says otherwise. 'I'm just wired differently,' Jake said at 3 AM, watching 'unexpected animal friendships' compilations. His alarm goes off at 7 AM. 'I'm tired,' Jake said. 'It's biological.' His doctor suggested 'going to bed earlier.' 'That's not how it works,' Jake said. It is how it works. Jake is tired.
